programme.desc: When Kenny meets with an unfortunate accident, Cartman lobbies to let Kenny die so he can get what Kenny left to him in Kenny's will. Meanwhile, Kenny is called upon to fight against the forces of Satan in heaven using his PSP skills.

programme.title: South Park: The Poor Kid
programme.desc: Kenny ends up in the foster care system after his parents are arrested.

programme.title: South Park: How to Eat With Your Butt
programme.desc: Cartman gets Kenny's school picture on every 'missing child' milk carton in the country. Cartman then sees the funniest thing ever and breaks his funny bone, losing his sense of humour.

programme.title: South Park: A Ladder to Heaven
programme.desc: Kenny died with the winning ticket to a prize of endless candy in his pocket. The boys decide to build a ladder to Heaven where they expect to find him and get the ticket back. The Feds think Saddam may be hiding weapons in Heaven and plan to bomb it.

programme.title: South Park: Kenny Dies
programme.desc: When Kenny contracts a deadly disease, Cartman refuses to let his friend die. He speaks before Congress in favour of stem-cell research that could potentially save Kenny's life.

programme.title: South Park: The Ring
programme.desc: Kenny takes his new girlfriend to a Jonas Brothers' concert where they each get purity rings.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: April 7, 2021
programme.desc: News reports, trends, pop culture, sports and politics with an alternative point of view.

programme.title: South Park: Elementary School Musical
programme.desc: The boys must embrace the latest fad to hit South Park Elementary or risk their status as the coolest kids in school.

programme.title: South Park: Something Wall-Mart This Way Comes
programme.desc: In order to save South Park, Stan and Kyle have to find a way to destroy the ever-expanding Wall Mart superstore while keeping Cartman from stabbing them in the back.

programme.title: South Park: Hooked on Monkey Fonics
programme.desc: To help Cartman win the school spelling bee, Cartman's Mom gives him the Hooked on Monkey Fonics spelling system. When the boys lose to a couple of home-schooled kids, Kyle becomes enamoured with the socially awkward sister.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: April 7, 2021
programme.desc: News reports, trends, pop culture, sports and politics with an alternative point of view.

programme.title: South Park: Miss Teacher Bangs a Boy

programme.title: South Park: The Tale of Scrotie McBoogerballs
programme.desc: The boys are given a controversial book to read in school and it inspires them to write one of their own. They convince Butters to take credit for the filth that they have written, but become jealous when he is hailed as a literary genius.

programme.title: South Park: Pre-School
programme.desc: Trent Boyett, the kid who took the fall for the boys five years ago is getting out of Juvie, and his first order of business is revenge. Fearful for their lives, Stan, Cartman, Kyle and Kenny hire sixth graders and Stan's sister as bodyguards.

programme.title: South Park: Major Boobage
programme.desc: In a South Park homage to the 1981 film, 'Heavy Metal,' the boys are trying to get Kenny off the latest drug craze that's captured the junior high and under set.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hunter or Hunted?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Buried Treasure

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Betrayal

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bed of Deceit
programme.desc: When a retired police officer is found shot dead in his bed, investigators suspect suicide. But the evidence, alongside surveillance tape from a nearby bank, seems to indicate it was murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoke in Your Eyes
programme.desc: The bodies of two young women are found in the ashes of an apartment fire, which appears to have been set deliberately.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flower Power
programme.desc: Two different men call police to report the same murder. Apparently, neither one knew that the other had called.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Strong Impressions
programme.desc: The wife of an Air Force officer is found dead in her bed, and authorities initially believe the cause of death to be accidental suffocation by a laundry bag, but further forensic investigation reveals the horrifying truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crash Course
programme.desc: A highway patrolman is shocked by a coroner's ruling of an 'accidental death.' after he attends a Crash scene with far more blood than usual. An anonymous tip reinvigorates the investigation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cereal Killer
programme.desc: Police must search for a boy who goes missing mysteriously after his home burns down and are disheartened when they find his body, but the killer left behind numerous clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg Up on Crime
programme.desc: The case of a decomposed body found in an irrigation canal goes unsolved until shoe prints left by the careless criminal while dumping the body of his second victim give authorities the evidence they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Wrong Foot
programme.desc: Illinois police discover a footprint on a birthday card that could lead to the home invader who killed a man and attacked two young girls.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Order Up
programme.desc: The murder of a prominent businessman in Colorado is particularly difficult to solve since the killers left virtually no forensic evidence at the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: An investigation into the disappearance of a young woman uncovers a tooth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sniffing Revenge
programme.desc: Unexpected death appears to be foul play but that is refuted after autopsy is performed.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Cloning the Woolly Mammoth
programme.desc: To help clone the extinct woolly mammoth back to life, Josh Gates visits the Korean biotech lab driving the project and excavates ancient bones in a working Canadian gold mine. He then descends into a vast sinkhole in Siberia to unearth frozen DNA.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Secrets of Shangri-La
programme.desc: Josh Gates treks high into the Sky Caves of Nepal in search of the origins of the Shangri-La myth.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Searching For America's Lost Flight
programme.desc: Josh Gates investigates why Northwest Flight 2501 vanished, taking the lives of all 58 people on board.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Warrior Queen's Treasure
programme.desc: Searching across England, Josh Gates unearths a cache of ancient treasure as he chases the legend of Queen Boudica, the legendary Celtic queen who nearly defeated the invading Roman army 2,000 years ago.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Hunt for Our Ancient Ancestors
programme.desc: Josh Gates travels the globe attempting to solve the most fundamental mystery of all: humanity's origins. How did we survive to the modern day? And what does that mean for our future?

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Lost Gold of Scotland
programme.desc: John joins treasure hunters in the Scottish Highlands chasing a lead on a lost cache of gold that was hidden after the Jacobite Uprising of 1745 and never recovered.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Search for Florida's Lost Pirate
programme.desc: Josh Gates sets sail for Florida chasing the long-lost treasure of bloodthirsty pirate Jose Gaspar. Josh joins marine archaeologists and treasure hunters working to crack the mysteries of the pirate's life so they can find the riches he left behind.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Japan's Atlantis
programme.desc: Josh heads to Japan to explore the sunken ruins called Japan's Atlantis.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Incan King's Mummy
programme.desc: Josh Gates ventures into the mysterious cloud forests of Ecuador's remote central highlands in search of the all-powerful mummy of the last Inca king, Atahualpa.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Lost Spanish Fortune, Found!
programme.desc: Josh travels the coast of Florida and to the newly opened country of Cuba in search of sunken treasure from a fleet of Spanish ships sunk in 1715. The hunt takes him deep into the Atlantic and into the previously sealed National Archives of Cuba.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Soaked
programme.desc: Dave and Cody are soaked and left in a rainforest; it will take their keen navigational skills to get them out.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Buried Alive
programme.desc: Armed with what's left of an avalanche victim's gear, Dave and Cody show how to survive in the harsh Rocky Mountains. Facing sub-zero temperatures, they make their way down a jagged ice waterfall, build a snow cave and try to salvage a dead elk carcass.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Frozen Plains
programme.desc: Dave and Cody take on the scenario of two ranchers, stranded on the windy plains in the dead of winter. Their only survival supplies are the charred remains of a burned-down shack: an axe head, a bison hide, a glass jar, a metal tin and a steel striker.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Stuck in the Muck
programme.desc: Dave and Cody head into the Everglades to take on the role of airboaters stuck in a sawgrass prairie marsh under the blazing Florida sun. They must seek shelter in a nearby swamp where water moccasin, python and alligators lay in wait.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Eating Dust
programme.desc: From the barren salt flats to the vast desert woodland, Dave and Cody battle the elements in the sun scorched desert of Baja, Mexico. With few supplies, they each demonstrate how to make use of an unlikely resource- urine.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Slash and Burn
programme.desc: Dave and Cody show how lost hunters can survive in the harsh conditions of Tierra Del Fuego, just 500 miles from Antarctica. To demonstrate how to survive an extreme injury, Dave self-inflicts a laceration and uses black powder to cauterize the wound.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Out of the Clouds
programme.desc: Dave and Cody take only a poncho, a specimen jar, and a broken lighter with them to take on the wet cloud forests of Panama.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Adrift
programme.desc: Dave and Cody take on the survival scenario of two castaways adrift at sea and show how to survive being stranded on a deserted jungle island in the South Pacific. This time, Dave goes barefoot.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Bitten
programme.desc: Dave and Cody show how to survive the rugged jungle in Thailand using only the gear an ill-equipped ecotourist might carry for a day trek: a Thai jungle knife, steel wool, a sharpening stone, a damaged cell phone and a bag of tobacco.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Mid-Air Repo
programme.desc: At one of the biggest aviation expos in the country, Ken and Danny track down a vintage Stearman biplane. Mike Kennedy helps an old pilot retrieve his stolen skywriting plane, and Kevin and Heather pose as tourists in order to attempt a rare mid-air repo.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: South of the Border
programme.desc: Mike Kennedy repos a chopper from the roof of a corporate high-rise. Kevin Lacey infiltrates a Mexican ranch to snatch a family plane stolen by a wayward brother. Ken and Danny find themselves up against a rival repo team.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Diving for Repos
programme.desc: In Florida, Mike Kennedy goes underwater to seize a seaplane. Meanwhile, Ken Cage and Danny Thompson chase a debtor who's fooling them with phony flight plans.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Ken Gets Played
programme.desc: A debtor suddenly swipes the helicopter that Ken and Danny were only seconds away from repossessing. Mike Kennedy enlists the help of his wife, Valerie, in a daring plot to seize a charter jet. Kevin is swarmed by FBI agents after an exhausting repo.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Brianne's Story
programme.desc: At over 700 pounds, Brianne undertakes a weight-loss journey to save her own life and faces an unexpected challenge to her fragile progress when her husband suffers a heart attack on a birthday she will never forget.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Maja and Justin: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Maja needs weight-loss surgery so she can lose weight, but Dr. Now won't approve her for surgery if she can't overcome getting dumped by her boyfriend Christian without using food to cope. Justin charts a course to be one of Dr. Now's best patients ever.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Brianne and Annjeanette: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: There is much to be gained -- and lost -- for Brianne in year two of her journey, in which she both loses weight and gains independence. Getting back with Erica becomes the top priority for Annjeanette, who chooses love over even her own health.

programme.title: Save My Skin: Mission: Skinfixable
programme.desc: Lucy's painful skin condition is preventing her from being the mom she wants to be, Daniel hopes to slay the beast occupying his head, Gini elects to have a large lipoma removed, and Zviko is ready to say goodbye to her ear keloids.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Walking on Broken Glass
programme.desc: Dr. Brad and Dr. Sarah have their hands full when they are faced with twins that have identical toe problems. Also, a boy with extremely itchy feet and a woman born with a massively large toe are desperate for Dr. Ebonie's help.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Brianne and Annjeanette: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: There is much to be gained -- and lost -- for Brianne in year two of her journey, in which she both loses weight and gains independence. Getting back with Erica becomes the top priority for Annjeanette, who chooses love over even her own health.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Walking on Broken Glass
programme.desc: Dr. Brad and Dr. Sarah have their hands full when they are faced with twins that have identical toe problems. Also, a boy with extremely itchy feet and a woman born with a massively large toe are desperate for Dr. Ebonie's help.

programme.title: Unexpected: The Mom Trying Out for Cheer

programme.desc: The Shemwells take the family on a camping trip and must contend with potty training the three youngest children. Meanwhile, Emma and Harper can't get along, and Tanner is jealous of stepbrother Brayden. Erica finally opens up to Spencer about her fears.

programme.desc: Chrystie, a newcomer to couponing, has a stockpile that is slowly taking over every spare space in her small home. Meanwhile, Treasure started couponing to save the family business, but now has a stockpile worth over $35,000.

programme.desc: Cole enlists his ex-girlfriend to help on a vital shopping trip, but her antics in the store impede his haul.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Erin and Dominique

programme.desc: Utah has decriminalized polygamy, and Christine toys with the idea of moving back. Meanwhile, coronavirus cases are rising, and Arizona goes into lockdown. Janelle tells Kody to stop coming over, and the whole family grapples with how to handle it all.

programme.title: Snapped: Danielle Parker
programme.desc: The death of a police officer leads to a search for her killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Silhouette

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Guilt Or Innocence

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: In the Name of the Father
programme.desc: When a construction worker unearths some human remains in the backyard of an old farmhouse, it sets off a baffling fifteen-year missing person's case and leaves detectives searching for long buried secrets and overdue justice.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Murders in Maine
programme.desc: When a young mother in Newport Maine goes missing, the case goes cold...until another mom suddenly vanishes, sparking an investigation that leads to a deadly game of cat-and-mouse and grisly discoveries in a rustic backyard.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Fatal Fall
programme.desc: A Milwaukee contractor is shocked when he discovers a body in a shallow backyard grave. The ghastly remains send investigators chasing an atrocious truth and have a community running scared from their own neighbors.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: The Imposter
programme.desc: A man goes missing from an idyllic Idaho town, leaving detectives puzzled and a daughter driven to find her father. As the investigation unravels, it reveals a truth that's stranger than fiction and a killer no one ever sees coming.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Gone Girls
programme.desc: When a man and his dog make a disturbing discovery in a backyard beach, a series of horrifying events unfold in a sleepy South Carolina town. Investigators fear no one is safe as they desperately track a killer potentially hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: New England Nightmare
programme.desc: A murderous ripple spreads through a lovely New England town when a ghastly discovery is made in a backyard barn. The search for answers uncovers troubling questions about a doting mom and everyone is a suspect until the truth is finally uncovered.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of the Haunted Prison
programme.desc: A mysterious American pyramid built out of Cold War paranoia, a haunted prison, and a strange cluster of structures in the Atlantic are mysterious deserted engineering projects are investigated.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Conspiracy on Devil's Mountain
programme.desc: A secret structure on a sinister mountain, an industrial compound swallowed by a forest, and a mysterious run in a sand dune are strange deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Alien Shrine
programme.desc: A strange alien shrine on a mountain peak, a bridge built in the Alaskan wilderness, and an American castle with a dangerous secret are mysterious deserted engineering projects and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of Mafia Island
programme.desc: A Mediterranean island paradise is not all that it seems; its complex of abandoned buildings were once prisons for the world's most dangerous Mafiosi; experts investigate new evidence to reveal who was imprisoned here and the secrets they left behind.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ruins of the Rust Belt
programme.desc: A complex of tall, windowless buildings in the American Rust Belt hold the secrets to a lost empire of industry and wealth; experts investigate these mysterious structures to reveal why this once powerful metropolis is now home to abandoned ruins.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: American Ghost Park
programme.desc: Deep in the wilderness of the American south, a long-abandoned amusement park is home to secrets of a forgotten, imaginary world. When experts investigate, they reveal why this bizarre place was built and what caused its downfall.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Arctic Hell Pit
programme.desc: Traces of a Russian hole to hell in the Arctic, a military base in America's Wild West, and a strange looming tower are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Towers of Blood
programme.desc: Abandoned towers in southern Greece are the ruins of a fearsome warrior civilization descended from the Spartans, and new discoveries reveal the role these towers played during generations of violent blood feuds among the clans that lived here.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Journey to Outcast Island
programme.desc: On a desolate island near Greece, abandoned buildings are evidence of a group of people that were forbidden to leave. Experts reveal who was forced to stay here and if there was a cover-up to conceal what really happened at this strange place.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Anarchy on Ireland's Alcatraz
programme.desc: The ruins of an abandoned prison are evidence of a chaotic riot that put the prisoners in charge. Special access to its burnt-out interior reveals how inmates took over Ireland's Alcatraz and why it is deserted today.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ghosts of the Cursed Castle
programme.desc: The ruins of a historic Scottish castle is now a bewitching wilderness of hidden dangers with deadly booby traps obscured afoot; experts and historians reveal a bygone Second World War military hospital with bizarre ties to an infamous Nazi occupant.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: American Atlantis
programme.desc: An abandoned town in the Nevada desert are the ruins of an American Atlantis, destroyed by catastrophic floods when the Hoover Dam was built. Today, experts investigate the secrets of this eerie ghost town as water levels recede and the city re-emerges.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Doom of El Dorado
programme.desc: The haunting remnants of a settlement in the Nevada desert lies scattered with decaying machinery and remains trapped in a bizarre time-warp; experts uncover a forgotten mine where dreams of discovering a fortune were met with chaos and murder.

programme.title: Murder by Numbers: Friend of the Devil
programme.desc: Within a month, four men in Orange County are brutally stabbed by a mysterious man. No one makes a connection to a gruesome double murder of a mother and son two months earlier, except the man sitting in prison for killing his own family.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Dead Man Talking

programme.title: Murder Calls: Down by the River

programme.desc: Jeffrey Franklin, a deaf sixteen-year-old, is dead. Now, body-cam video and original audio capture detectives' hunt for what happened. As the investigation unravels, GPS data and shocking admissions give Jeffrey the justice he desperately deserves.

programme.title: Diabolical: Caught in the Cover-Up
programme.desc: In West Bloomfield, Michigan, a simple affair between two coworkers turns complex as the two lovers are willing to do anything...even commit murder... to protect their darkest secret.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Everybody Loves Rick
programme.desc: Most high school love ends in heartbreak - but not Richard and Jolena's. Years later, their love is rekindled - but one of them is married to someone else. Tempers flare, trust is betrayed and one in the triangle will end up dead.

programme.title: Wives With Knives: Now We're Even
programme.desc: To deal with the pressure of balancing school and work, Flora Williams turns to prescription pills. Soon after, she falls in love with an older man named Matt. But when he reveals his true colors, the relationship takes a volatile turn.

programme.title: Dangerous Persuasions: Forsaken by God
programme.desc: Maura Schmierer joins a Christian group to devote her life to God. Instead she's trapped in a militaristic regime that destroys her marriage and separates her from her children. She ends up in solitary confinement with a new name - 'Forsaken'.

programme.title: Deadly Devotion: Highway to Hell
programme.desc: When a mysterious biker invites single mother Cynthia Garcia to an exclusive party at the Hells Angels clubhouse, she unwittingly enters a secret and dangerous world… with a sacred code that the outlaw bikers would kill to uphold.

programme.title: Love Kills: It Was All a Big Fantasy
programme.desc: Josh is living his dream of running his family's farm with his girlfriend Donna by his side. But this perfect fantasy is shattered when Josh's mother takes the farm away from them. Revenge is served with a shotgun blast. But who pulled the trigger?

programme.title: Wicked Attraction: Mommy's Little Helpers
programme.desc: When Laura Hernandez, mother of five, meets Alberto Macias, sparks fly. A beautiful matriarch, she's used to getting her way. Alberto is willing to do anything to keep her happy, But when he falls on hard times, Laura takes matters into her own hands...

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Killer Confession
programme.desc: Melissa Atkin is found bound and murdered in her home in Smyrna, Tennessee. Eventually, the investigation focuses in on two individuals, with a series of recorded phone calls proving vital in exonerating one of them, whilst incriminating the other.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Memorial Day Murder
programme.desc: Chris Northam is an entrepreneur building his extreme sports business in the suburb of Roseville, California. When he is fatally gunned down in his warehouse, detectives look to his disgruntled employees and his mistress in search of the killer.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Tracking the Murders of Israel Keyes
programme.desc: Get a look at never-before-seen evidence in the FBI's search to identify victims of a notorious serial killer.

programme.title: Raw Terror: Murder on the Tracks
programme.desc: Robert Limon is murdered in a seemingly random attack while working on the railroad. Robert's sister Christina is distraught and desperate for answers. Years later detectives uncover a sinister plot to murder him involving those closest to Robert.

programme.title: Home Alone: Demons of the Past
programme.desc: In desolate, isolated Nebraska in 2014, Valerie and her loving adopted son Nathan are starting a new chapter of their lives when a knock at the door one night brings back demons of the past.

programme.title: Dead Reckoning: Murder in the Park
programme.desc: 19 year-old single mother, Cheyenne Clough is brutally assaulted and left in a secluded park to die. As police unlock the secrets of her life, they discover a trail of blind loyalty and deadly betrayal may have led to her murder.

programme.title: Shattered: Do You Know My Voice?
programme.desc: Linda Hardin is convinced Grant is the perfect husband. In 2017, when he's arrested for murder, Linda believes police have the wrong man. Then officers show up at her door with evidence of another crime and her devotion is put to the test.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Priory of Sion
programme.desc: Inside Secret Societies investigates the mysterious secret society known as 'The Priory of Sion' that traces its roots back to the 12th Century and is believed to protect incontrovertible, if heretical, information about the marriage of Jesus Christ.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Order of Assassins
programme.desc: The Assassins were one of the mostly deadly, notorious and secretive groups in the medieval world. Find out if the romance behind these brutally efficient killers is true and if their skills and tactics have been copied by today's Islamic terrorists.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Menace
programme.desc: See how Hitler succeeded in conquering Germany. Nothing predestines this mediocre student and failed artist to become dictator of Germany the Führer.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: 1929. Germany, harshly affected by the worldwide economic crisis, is sinking into despair. Bloody street fighting between Nazis and Communists is raging. Fear of the 'Red peril' will push millions of voters into Hitler's arms. Democracy is at risk.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Order of Assassins
programme.desc: The Assassins were one of the mostly deadly, notorious and secretive groups in the medieval world. Find out if the romance behind these brutally efficient killers is true and if their skills and tactics have been copied by today's Islamic terrorists.

programme.title: Mob Citizen: Joe Colombo
programme.desc: The story of mobster Joe Colombo, whose love of fame and money was matched by his determination to campaign against Italian-American harassment in the United States.

programme.title: The Mob Enforcer: Tony Spilotro
programme.desc: See the story of Tony Spilotro, who protected the Chicago Mafia's interests in the casinos of Las Vegas and became a target for the FBI.

programme.title: Colombian Rambo
programme.desc: In 1980 the trickle of cocaine coming in to Florida suddenly becomes a flood and drug wars erupt on the streets. Carlos Lehder is behind it all. The DEA must take him down before he destroys the USA with the drug he calls Latin America's 'atomic bomb.'

programme.title: Mafia vs. JFK
programme.desc: Florida and Cuba were ruled by top don Santo Trafficante. The King of Cuba's casinos was on the verge of mob stardom when a revolution destroys his plans. It results in a secret alliance between the mob and the CIA and a failed assassination attempt.

programme.title: Mafia's Day of Reckoning
programme.desc: What happened when the FBI pursued the five families who ran organised crime in New York, and the fate of two informers is revealed.

programme.title: Meyer Lansky and the Crime Syndicate
programme.desc: The story of Meyer Lansky, an associate of Lucky Luciano who was linked to criminal financial operations, but the FBI struggled to pin anything on him, or find his riches.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Monumental Realities
programme.desc: The myths behind some of history's most defining moments are uncovered, as well as revealing facts behind America's space explorations.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Cowboys vs. Hollywood
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, it's time to rethink Hollywood's vision of the old west and learn about the truth behind some of America's renowned rivalries.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Yankees, Rebels and World War II
programme.desc: World War II myths are explored. Forgotten truths of America's Civil War are examined.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Science or Sci-Fi?
programme.desc: The science in our nation's history is examined. Explore the myths that infect America's medical history and learn the facts behind America's nuclear age.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Defying the Nazis
programme.desc: We all think the U.S. started fighting the Nazi's after the Pearl Harbour attacks, but what you don't know are the stories behind some of the biggest deceptions, the top secrets and the secret weapons used to help defy the Nazis in WWII.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Tamara's Tudor Tutorial
programme.desc: Tamara Day takes on a 1927 Tudor by blowing out the existing small kitchen and outfitting it with a large island and eating nook. She transforms a bedroom into a dining room, but her hopes of refurbishing the deck begin to break apart.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Shower Showstopper
programme.desc: Tamara takes on a behemoth 1927 Tudor house, but while she admires the home's original details, her dad discovers a problem. She uses a kitchenette to create a bar, revamps an uneven patio and enlarges the master bathroom.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Rhapsody in Beige
programme.desc: Tamara transforms a contemporary home on a large wooded lot that's devoid of any character. She installs huge windows to bring the outdoors inside, but she faces issues with resurfacing a fireplace veneer.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: A Pain in the Deck
programme.desc: Continuing renovations on a large and bland contemporary home, Tamara tackles the master suite and replaces lots of dated cabinetry to make a stylish bathroom. She also creates a home heater and an immense deck and patio.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Bumming About the Plumbing
programme.desc: Tamara tackles a 1905 Kansas City Shirtwaist home that's short on bathrooms but not short on charm. She restores the front door, updates the fireplace and renovates the kitchen, but struggles with sewer and roof issues.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Mirror, Mirror on the Bathroom Wall
programme.desc: Tamara Day takes on a 1905 Kansas City Shirtwaist that has only one bathroom. She doubles the size of the walk-in closet and enlarges the master suite, but her hopes of updating the home's bedrooms start to sink when her contractor discovers a leak.

programme.desc: Preservationist Brett Waterman transforms homes with bad renovations and ugly additions.

programme.title: Restored: 1923 Craftsman Bungalow

programme.title: Restored: 1900 Victorian Farmhouse
programme.desc: A couple seeks Brett's help restoring their big 1900 Victorian Farmhouse in time for their wedding. They're hoping he can design a rustic kitchen, update the laundry area and add light to the interior rooms closed off by past modifications.

programme.title: Restored: 1920s Spanish Eclectic
programme.desc: A couple find a cute 1920s Spanish eclectic home in which they want to update the kitchen, add an ensuite bathroom and dressing room to the master, and plant a drought-tolerant garden, all staying in Spanish style.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Lexington Storefront
programme.desc: The crew take a stab at a refurbished storefront in historic downtown Lexington, Virginia. This second-generation salvage requires a lot of finesse, as the building is being renovated rather than destroyed. Windowpanes become a room divider.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: A Family Renovation
programme.desc: Two brothers and their wives look for the perfect vacation home in Door County, Wisconsin, for their extended family. They find a charmer with plenty of space for up to 30 people, but their DIY reno reveals unexpected issues.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Rework in Wisconsin
programme.desc: A couple finds a fixer-upper in Wisconsin that overlooks Lake Michigan and they're doing all the renovation work themselves. He's a contractor with experience renovating properties, and she's ready to join him and get her hands dirty.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Making Memories on Lake Martin
programme.desc: A blended family of eight finds a vacation home on Lake Martin, Alabama, but the property needs major renovations. He's a contractor and is ready to get to work with a tight budget and a long to-do list to help the family realize their lakeside dreams.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Next Up: Niagara
programme.desc: A couple seek a property along Lake Ontario in Niagara County that could be an escape for the family, but needs some work. They are no strangers to renovations, but with a tight budget they may have bitten off more than they can chew.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Otter Tail Transformation
programme.desc: A family is looking for a lake home in Otter Tail County, Minnesota. They find a property they like, but it's far from turnkey. With a massive renovation, they may discover they've bitten off more than they can chew.

programme.title: Pool Kings: All About the View
programme.desc: Steve and Justin are determined to convert a couple's neglected '80s-style pool into a modern lakeside paradise, but hidden engineering issues make this build more complicated than it seems.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Georgia Peach Pool Paradise
programme.desc: The Parrish family has saved their whole lives to build a tropical pool paradise in the heart of Georgia. But not everything is peachy on this build when hard soil and a complicated lazy river design present major challenges for the team.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Stay the Course
programme.desc: The Pool Kings head to Austin, Texas to build a pool alongside a golf course. The guys have their work cut out for them as they work to create a feature-filled pool that works in all seasons, provides privacy from golfers and matches the new patio.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Pool With a View
programme.desc: Paul and Brian learn the hard way that it isn't always so sunny in California as they transform an odd-shaped outdoor space into an elevated pool with an ocean view.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Build the Pool and They Will Come
programme.desc: Grandparents want an irresistible pool to ensure the grandkids will want to spend plenty of time at their new place. Steve and Justin come through with a beautiful raised pool design featuring a huge deck that triples the entertaining space.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Magnificent Mediterranean Pool
programme.desc: This pool is so extraordinary it takes over a year to build. From a 60-foot pool and a 14-foot spa to a hand-carved Italian marble fountain, the kinds pull out all the stops to give a family a piece of the Mediterranean.

programme.title: Pool Kings: All the Way Around
programme.desc: Mike and Jim have their work cut out for them when a Palm Springs couple wants to transform their narrow three-sided backyard into a personal resort by adding a grotto, zen area, putting green, oversized spa, and beach entry.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Hawaiian Paradise Pool
programme.desc: Hawaii may be 3,000 miles away, but the kings are able to recreate the island paradise right outside this family's door. They turn the Ritters' old yard into a luxurious lagoon and give them a dreamy spot to make lots of new memories.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Hill Country Heaven
programme.desc: After years of clearing and construction, Rene and Kelly are finally ready to put in a pool that completes their beautiful, 20-acre San Antonio property. Tony and Paul include a huge natural waterfall, stacked-stone spa and Baja shelf.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Spa Fabulous
programme.desc: After recovering from a harrowing parachuting incident, a military veteran learned to walk again, got married, started a family and is now ready to build a pool. The custom oasis includes a jumping rock, a Baja shelf and plunge spa.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Kicked-Up Classics
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Memphis with a triple-layered twist on regional dry-rub ribs and a succulent corned beef that's a 30-day labour of love. Then, in Phoenix, classic mac and cheese gets a boozy boost from a special in-house brew.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smokehouse Reinventions
programme.desc: In Islip, N.Y., Michael Symon digs into a decadent, 17-layer smokehouse reinvention of lasagna with pork, brisket, bacon and mac and cheese. Then in Buffalo, a brewpub serves up the city's most famous export, buffalo chicken.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Everything's Bigger and Better in Texas
programme.desc: Discover a Forth Worth Tex Mex Burrito almost as big as the state of Texas itself.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: California Dreamin'
programme.desc: Noah is California dreamin' for the Golden State's best carnival eats. He sets things on fire with a Deep Pit BBQ dinner, gets groovy with the Green Goddess and celebrates with Birthday Cake Crepes.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Grill Bill
programme.desc: Noah Cappe travels to the Great Lakes to visit the Barry County Fair.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Fry Harder
programme.desc: Noah Cappe soaks up the California sunshine while enjoying some wacky West Coast treats at the San Diego County Fair in Del Mar, California.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: There Will Be Bacon
programme.desc: Noah Cappe pigs out at the Bacon and Bourbon Fest in Wellington, Fla., where all-American classics make an appearance in the stuffed crust bacon-za, but it's the peanut butter pork donuts that hit the sweet and salty spot.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Mocktail
programme.desc: Noah Cappe goes loco for Sunshine State snacks at the Manatee County Fair in Palmetto, Fla. There's lots of ooey-gooey goodness in the pizza supremo burger and the ulti-melt burger, but it's the sandia loca that has Noah flipping out.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Guilty Pleasures
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases fifteen of the most delightfully decadent dishes from around America. From bacon brownies to chicken fried lobster, they're the type of savory pleasures and sweet sensations that make everyone long for 'cheat day'.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Handheld Happiness
programme.desc: This food tour heads to some of the most amazing eateries for handheld food, with no bowls, plates or utensils getting in the way, from big bags of saucy seafood in Chicago to arepas stuffed with slow-cooked meats in Minneapolis.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Food Hall Frenzy
programme.desc: Food halls are the new one-stop shop for a range of gourmet eats on the go. There's gravy-smothered fried chicken biscuits and Vietnamese-Cajun cuisine in New Orleans. Next, there's both New-York-style pizza and ice cream tacos in Portland.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Grilled
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases 12 of the best grilled dishes in restaurants across America. He's hanging out in the kitchens of fire-loving chefs to learn everything there is to know about applying heat and smoke for the tastiest chicken, beef, and more.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Island Eats
programme.desc: Roger Mooking searches the country for the 12 best island eats from lobster, conch and shellfish to low-country boils and key lime pies.

programme.desc: Bluey and her family play a game in the house with a balloon; Bluey and Bingo argue over a magic xylophone; Bluey, Coco and Snickers play a game called Shadowlands.

programme.title: Bluey: Early Baby / Hospital / Daddy Putdown
programme.desc: Rusty and Indy come into conflict; Dad is admitted to an imaginary hospital; Dad puts Bluey and Bingo to bed.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Snowy Gablooey/ Gooooal!
programme.desc: Doc treats a frozen Oooey Gablooey after Donny accidently leaves him out in the snow. Doc helps Sir Kirby realize the importance of reporting an injury right away after he injures his arm during a game of ice hockey.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Engine Nine, Feelin' Fine/ The Right Stuff
programme.desc: Doc and her toys learn a lesson about dehydration after discovering that Donny's toy fire engine has run out of water. Stuffy rips his tail and tries to hide it from Doc and the toys learn that anyone can get hurt - even brave dragons.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Mini-Golfin' Guard Pups / Summer Splash Bash
programme.desc: When Santa and Mrs. Claus have an unusual problem during their summer vacation, the Pugs and Keia help save their trip! The Pugs help find the Queen of England's jeweled egg!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Wonder-Bob/ Yay, Earth Day!
programme.desc: When Bob's lucky baseball bat breaks, the pups go on a mission to find a new one in time for the championship game. The pugs help a group of lost moles find their way back home!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Prospector Pups
programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.title: Bluey: Mum and Dads / Mount Mumandad / Asparagus
programme.desc: Rusty and Indy have a disagreement; Bluey and Bingo pretend Mum and Dad are a mountain; Dad teaches Bluey table manners.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: School Alone/ It Came From Outer Space
programme.desc: Alvin and Brittany get stuck at school with a ghost that roams the halls; Alvin gets some unwanted attention when he claims to have found a meteor.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Munks/ World
programme.desc: Superstars Alvin, Simon and Theodore take a roller coaster ride of music and laughter.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Mighty Mom and Dyno Dad/ Knighty Knight
programme.desc: Timmy gives Mom and Dad superpowers; Timmy wishes he could go to the real Middle Ages.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Turning Into Turner/ The Wand That Got Away

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Wishology: The Exciting Middle Part
programme.desc: Timmy learns that to truly defeat The Darkness, he needs a second wand, which is located on the far side of the universe. The threat from the robotic Eliminators still remains as they have stolen Yugopotamia's Fake-i-fier technology.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Brendar the Barbarian
programme.desc: Brendar is expelled from the Royal Order of Warrior Princesses, and is left as a 'feared and revered' Barbarian.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Dog Days/ Dragon Dad
programme.desc: The Chipmunks take in a stray dog, but have to keep the puppy hidden from Dave, who won't allow pets. Theodore orders a dragon egg in the hopes of it hatching into a real dragon.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Simsky/ Lucky Day
programme.desc: Simon is alarmed to discover he's been tagging private property in his sleep. Alvin's luck goes from bad to worse after Theodore finds a four-leaf clover and everything starts going his way.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Slink or Swim/ The Big Chill
programme.desc: When Bobby finds out Carl can't swim, he offers to show him the ways of the waves. After begging Abuelo for A/C, the cousins decide to earn some cash at the neighborhood fair.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Operation Dad
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne tries to convince her Dad to move to the city with the help of Sid.

programme.title: The Loud House: Along Came a Sister/ Chore and Peace
programme.desc: Lincoln causes trouble when he loses the class tarantula during his turn taking care of it. Lincoln declares a strike until he can convince someone to switch chores with him.

programme.title: The Loud House: Everybody Loves Leni/ Middle Men
programme.desc: Torn between her work friends and her school friends, Leni tries to bring everyone together. When Lincoln and Clyde go to tour the middle school, Lynn gives them some questionable advice.

programme.title: The Loud House: Stage Plight/ Antiqued Off
programme.desc: Hoping to get closer to her crush, Benny, Luan tries out for the school play. When Clyde and schoolmate Zach bond over antiques, Lincoln finds himself feeling like a third wheel.

programme.title: The Loud House: Absent Minded/ Be Stella My Heart
programme.desc: Clyde discovers he didn't earn the junior administrator job, but doesn't want to give up the perks that come along with it. When the new girl starts hanging around Lincoln and his friends, they begin to suspect she likes one of them.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pizza Delivery/ Home Sweet Pineapple

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Jellyfish Hunter/ The Fry Cook Games

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: License to Milkshake/ Squid Baby
programme.desc: SpongeBob learns his milkshake license has expired, and is forced to go back to the milkshake academy.

programme.title: It's Pony: Plants/ Heston's Coat
programme.desc: When Annie and Pony plan a camping trip, Pony becomes afraid of plants. Then, Heston loans Annie his new coat, but Annie knows Pony will ruin it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Eek, an Urchin!/ Squid's Defense
programme.desc: Squidward wants SpongeBob and Sandy to teach him karate after being robbed of his groceries. SpongeBob goes to great lengths to force out a pesky sea urchin from the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Man Ray Returns/ Larry the Floor Manager

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Help Wanted: Reef Blowers

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Nature Pants/ Opposite Day

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pre-Hibernation Week/ Life of Crime
programme.desc: Sandy is going into hibernation; it's alright to 'borrow' things if you return them.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mermaidman and Barnacle Boy III/ Squirrel Jokes
programme.desc: Mermaidman and Barnacle Boy go away for the weekend; Bob becomes a stand-up comic.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Survival of the Idiots/ Dumped

programme.desc: Dorothy resists pressure to pass a failing student-athlete and Rose accuses her dentist.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Zborn Again
programme.desc: Sophia tries once again to dissuade Dorothy from reconciling with her ex-husband Stan.

programme.title: Reba: Let's Get Physical

programme.title: Reba: Just Business
programme.desc: Houston's premier real estate agent, Steve Norris, contacts Reba and Van for a meeting. Reba is thrilled but Van is concerned that he will once again be relegated to acting as Reba's assistant at the new company. Barbra Jean is looking better than ever.

programme.title: Reba: Trading Spaces
programme.desc: Van builds a new home office in the garage so he and Reba can be more productive. Reba finds juggling family and the additional workload is difficult. Van has a surprising reason he feels pressure to earn more money.

programme.title: Reba: Roll With It
programme.desc: Reba is thrilled when Kyra moves back in with her, but is stunned when she catches her drinking. Brock confesses he let her have the occasional beer in the house and reluctantly agrees to go along with this new parenting plan.

programme.title: Reba: The Break Up
programme.desc: Reba and Van call it quits on their real estate partnership; Barbra Jean auditions for TV.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Bloom Is Off the Rose

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Sister of the Bride

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Miles to Go
programme.desc: The girls find out that Rose's boyfriend is in a witness protection program.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: There Goes the Bride
programme.desc: Dorothy has been sneaking around so that Sophia doesn't discover that she's been dating Stan. However, when Stan proposes, Dorothy must reveal the truth to Sophia.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: There Goes the Bride
programme.desc: Totally against Dorothy and Stan's impending nuptials, Sophia vows to not let the ceremony go off. Meanwhile, Blanche begins interviewing for a new roommate since Dorothy is planning to move out.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Older and Wiser
programme.desc: Wanting someone to watch after Sophia during the day, Dorothy gets Sophia a job under false pretenses. Meanwhile, Blanche and Rose are all excited about being hired as models for a Penny Saver.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Melodrama
programme.desc: Blanche wants to intensify her relationship with her infamous one-night-stand-man, Mel Bushman. Meanwhile, Rose tries her hand at TV reporting. Her assignment: a dog show.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Even Grandmas Get the Blues
programme.desc: While babysitting for her granddaughter, a man mistakes Blanche as being the baby's mother and Blanche does nothing to set him straight. Meanwhile, Sophia gets ready for the Festival of the Dancing Virgins.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Witness

programme.title: The Golden Girls: What a Difference a Date Makes

programme.title: Reba: Sweet Child O'Mine

programme.title: Reba: Locked and Loaded

programme.title: Reba: As We Forgive Those...

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Big Chill
programme.desc: When a woman dies after a long illness, investigators have to determine if her death was due to natural causes, suicide, or murder.

programme.desc: When a woman is found dead in a ravine, police are stuck, as any evidence was washed away by storms. 20 years after the fact, an old hat and a tiny chip of metal put investigators back on the trail of a case long gone cold.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Puzzle
programme.desc: When a bicycle rider is struck and fatally injured in a hit-and-run accident, forensic investigators utilize an assortment of miniscule clues to determine the identity of the offending vehicle and eventually the person who was driving it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Headquarters
programme.desc: Hunters stumble upon a scene that includes a skull and small bones, bits of clothing, a woman's shoe, and a strand of hair. Police determine a woman was stabbed to death, and reconstruct an image of her face to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Paintball
programme.desc: In 1962, the people of the small town of Hanford, California lost their sense of peace when one of their own, 15 year-old Marlene Miller, was murdered. It would take 24 years to bring her killer to justice.

programme.desc: For 23 years, Leneatha has worked as a pharmacy tech at a local hospital. Now, she has a young daughter to support, but she's so big that it's hard to move. If Dr. Now can't help her stop eating, losing her job could be the least of her worries.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Supersized: Chrystal's Journey
programme.desc: Having her daughters help bathe her is not how Chrystal pictured parenting, but she is so large now that there's no other option. Chrystal wants Dr. Now's help, but she didn't know that bringing her childhood trauma to light would be part of the deal.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Samantha's Story
programme.desc: At nearly 1,000 pounds, Samantha is dangerously close to dying. To make matters worse, she's paid to eat by making videos online. If Samantha doesn't overcome her toxic relationship with food, she worries that she will leave her daughter motherless.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Stephanie/ Larry

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Putting the P in Pool
programme.desc: Find what Sal finds stressful about posing as a cashier; what's Q's favorite on-set beverage; and when did the crew have to arrive poolside to get a front row seat for Joe's pee punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Snow Way Out

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Peeling Away
programme.desc: Bobby Flay better bust out his rolling pin! Texas pastry chef Amanda Rockman and blast from Bobby's past Vicki Wells roll into the arena for a chance at sweet victory. "Chopped's" Ted Allen and actress Busy Philipps will see who can rise to the occasion.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Break a Plate!
programme.desc: Two Italian-cuisine cutthroats, chefs Adam Leonti and Anthony Scolaro, face off for a shot at scuffing up Bobby's record with a loss. Rachael Ray and Damaris Phillips determine who has the sauce to take on the boss.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Chocolate Covered Clash
programme.desc: Chef Michael Voltaggio gets help from an extra special guest, celebrated actress Drew Barrymore, to take down Bobby Flay. They bring in fantastic pastry chefs DaVee Harned and Miriam Rieder Taylor, who have a passion for chocolate.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Old School, New School
programme.desc: It's old school versus new school as experienced chef Andrew Evans battles the up and coming chef Brooke Mallory for the chance to Beat Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Familiar Names and Faces
programme.desc: Ted Allen and Sunny Anderson step into the arena, but this time they're switching things up to ensure a win. They've brought in Bobby Flay's friend and chef, Stephen Kalt, and Marc Vetri's protégé, Brad Spence, in hopes of knocking Bobby down a peg.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Inside Scoop
programme.desc: Actress Helene Yorke and Chopped's Alex Guarnaschelli conspire to beat Bobby Flay. They bring in southern boy Bobby Hansen and the Midwest's Steven Oakley, two chefs who are vying to take down the east coast king.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Best in Snow
programme.desc: Food Network's Sunny Anderson and Christian Petroni set hearts and hearths ablaze as they try to snow in Bobby Flay for the season. Minnesota-native chefs Karyn Tomlinson and Erick Harcey do their best to bring the frigid winter to Bobby's kitchen.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Record Breaking
programme.desc: It's West Coast versus East Coast as Michelin-starred Jarad Gallagher and worldly Joshua Bedford aim to teach Bobby Flay a thing or two in the kitchen. Here to lead them to victory are celebrity chef Josh Capon and sportscaster Jaymee Sire.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Nancy Foots the Bill
programme.desc: Robert Irvine is in Geneva, NY, at Cosentino's Ristorante, where co-owners Bill and Nancy are struggling to save their family restaurant. Their marriage is suffering from an unbalanced workload while their inexperienced son serves unappetizing food.

programme.title: Chef Boot Camp: Have a Little Faith
programme.desc: Chef Cliff Crooks mentors a chef jeopardizing a local favorite spot in Port Jefferson, NY, a chef who refuses to change the menu at a seafood restaurant in New Haven, CT, and a daughter and head chef with no drive for her mom's dream in East Meadow, NY.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Fancy Vs. Rustic
programme.desc: The claws are out as "The Kitchen's" Sunny Anderson and Katie Lee try their best to take down Bobby Flay. They've brought in polar opposites, sweet but ferocious Angie Berry and Italian stallion Giuliano Matarese, who are both gunning for victory.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Friends in All Places
programme.desc: Bobby Flay's pals are coming in hot from the west and east coast to take him down at his own game! Michael Symon is here to settle the score, as he pits New York chef Alex Guarnaschelli against LA chef Jet Tila in this all-out battle of friends.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Best in Snow
programme.desc: Food Network's Sunny Anderson and Christian Petroni set hearts and hearths ablaze as they try to snow in Bobby Flay for the season. Minnesota-native chefs Karyn Tomlinson and Erick Harcey do their best to bring the frigid winter to Bobby's kitchen.

programme.desc: It's West Coast versus East Coast as Michelin-starred Jarad Gallagher and worldly Joshua Bedford aim to teach Bobby Flay a thing or two in the kitchen. Here to lead them to victory are celebrity chef Josh Capon and sportscaster Jaymee Sire.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Nancy Foots the Bill
programme.desc: Robert Irvine is in Geneva, NY, at Cosentino's Ristorante, where co-owners Bill and Nancy are struggling to save their family restaurant. Their marriage is suffering from an unbalanced workload while their inexperienced son serves unappetizing food.

programme.title: Chef Boot Camp: Have a Little Faith
programme.desc: Chef Cliff Crooks mentors a chef jeopardizing a local favorite spot in Port Jefferson, NY, a chef who refuses to change the menu at a seafood restaurant in New Haven, CT, and a daughter and head chef with no drive for her mom's dream in East Meadow, NY.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Fancy Vs. Rustic
programme.desc: The claws are out as "The Kitchen's" Sunny Anderson and Katie Lee try their best to take down Bobby Flay. They've brought in polar opposites, sweet but ferocious Angie Berry and Italian stallion Giuliano Matarese, who are both gunning for victory.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Friends in All Places
programme.desc: Bobby Flay's pals are coming in hot from the west and east coast to take him down at his own game! Michael Symon is here to settle the score, as he pits New York chef Alex Guarnaschelli against LA chef Jet Tila in this all-out battle of friends.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Beat Bobby Flay: The Musical
programme.desc: Things get lyrical in the kitchen when Food Network's Damaris Phillips gets TV host Jaymee Sire to join her sing-along that doesn't end, much to Bobby Flay's annoyance.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: A Pioneering Ordeal
programme.desc: Chef Alex Guarnaschelli links up with the Pioneer Woman, Ree Drummond, to orchestrate a loss. Two southern gentlemen, Atlanta's Jamarium Banks and Vince Giancarlo from Charlotte, North Carolina won't be playing nice as they try to beat Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Against All Odds

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: A successful, seemingly healthy doctor collapses at home and is rushed to the ER, leaving friends and colleagues puzzled. When her blood test reveals what killed her, the case goes from a medical mystery to murder mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Silhouette
programme.desc: Real-life mysteries. Investigative reporting. Justice.

programme.title: Killer Motive: Deception in the Desert
programme.desc: When a soldier is gunned down on a dusty street in a California desert town, the investigation tests the bonds of friendship – and the limits of family loyalty – as police close in on the killer.

programme.title: Killer Motive: Waking Nightmare
programme.desc: When a wife claims she woke up to discover her husband had been shot to death as she slept next to him – and she didn't see or hear a thing – police are dubious. Is she a shocked and grieving widow, or a cunning killer with a twisted master plan?

programme.title: Killer Motive: Domestic Terror
programme.desc: A Naval officer who rose through the ranks and once questioned terrorists at Guantanamo Bay is found by his wife, dead inside a Florida hotel room. Is the brutal crime connected to his wartime service, or are secrets closer to home to blame?

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Deadly Disrespect

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Fatal Ambition

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: A Genius Murder

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Murderer on Main St.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: The Mayor’s Wife

programme.desc: When a sinkhole suddenly sucks a man through a Brooklyn crosswalk, engineers use the latest cutting-edge tech in a race to fix the devastating damage and prevent more deadly sinkholes from striking.

programme.title: Sinkholes: Swallowed Alive: Man-Eating Monster
programme.desc: When a deadly man-eating sinkhole consumes a Florida house, engineers race to use cutting-edge technology to fix the devastating damage and prevent more deadly sinkholes from striking.

programme.title: Sinkholes: Swallowed Alive: Florida Hell Hole
programme.desc: When a sinkhole suddenly forms beneath a Florida resort, engineers race to use cutting-edge technology to fix the devastating damage and prevent more deadly sinkholes from striking.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Nightmare on Main Street
programme.desc: A railroad bridge on the edge of disaster, a nightmare in a fairy-tale town, and a massive cathedral in calamity are engineering catastrophes in need of repair, and experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal if they can be fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Terror at Doomsday Dam
programme.desc: When America's tallest dam threatens to burst, a nearby town finds itself an hour away from total annihilation, and engineers use cutting-edge technology to reveal what went wrong and if disaster can be averted.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: The Towering Inferno
programme.desc: A skyscraper causing hellish heat in downtown Dallas, a swarm of sinkholes, and a landmark with a fatal secret.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Terror in Tacoma
programme.desc: After a giant suspension bridge begins to violently rock, it suddenly collapses, marking one of the most iconic engineering disasters of all time; using the latest science, experts reveal what went so catastrophically wrong at the Tacoma Narrows bridge.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Apollo 13: The Secret Evidence
programme.desc: New science reveals the inside story of the Apollo 13 disaster, and using the latest evidence, experts reveal what really went wrong and how NASA saved the lives of the three astronauts stranded in space in a life-or-death race against the clock.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Chicago's Tower of Terror
programme.desc: When the innovative design of an iconic Chicago skyscraper leads to tragedy, experts must apply cutting-edge tech and the latest engineering methods to fix an urgent, life-or-death problem.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Deepwater Disaster
programme.desc: The Deepwater Horizon oil rig drilled into the deepest oil reserves on the planet, but a sudden explosion on-board led to the worst oil spill in history. Experts reveal what went wrong and how cutting-edge science finally fixed this catastrophe.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Oil Rig vs. Sinkhole
programme.desc: When an oil rig in a Louisiana lake drills in the wrong place, it causes a massive whirlpool that drains the entire lake; experts investigate why this sinkhole disaster was one of the greatest engineering catastrophes in American history.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Ex's and Alibis
programme.desc: On December 3, 200, Louisiana Melton and her boyfriend Phillip Brown are found shot dead. Detective Harris of the Houston Police Department has little evidence from the crime scene, a large list of potential suspects, and one huge lie.

programme.title: Southern Gothic: Memphis Blues
programme.desc: A loving mother is shot three times at a gas station in Memphis, Tennessee. As police search for clues, a mysterious letter threatens to complicate the already-tense relationship between local law enforcement and the community they've sworn to protect.

programme.title: American Nightmare: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Winter in Iowa gets an extra chill when Shirley Wilson's son finds her stabbed to death in her home. With no forced entry, detectives believe this grandmother of 12 knew her assailant, leaving the family wondering who has betrayed them in cold blood.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Have you Seen Me?
programme.desc: Debora Gail Moody vanished into thin air from her home in Ludowici Georgia. A decade passes in her case with no answers, but her family persisted by posting billboards all around town. Eleven years later, a confession reveals the chilling details.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Jenner Beach Murders
programme.desc: A Christian couple's weekend getaway takes a tragic turn when they are found murdered on a northern California beach. Satanic imagery found nearby leads local Sheriff's deputies on a manhunt complicated by a cagey killer who covered his tracks.

programme.title: The Body in the Trunk
programme.desc: When Cathy Torrez disappears after her shift at a local drugstore in California, a desperate hunt begins. A week later, police discover her body in the trunk of her own car. Her murder sparks a twenty-year fight to put her killer behind bars.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Son is Damaged Goods
programme.desc: Jeanne Avsenew and her young son Peter were close, but as Peter matured, his obsession with death grew. The day Jeanne finds a bullet with her name scrawled on it, she realizes her son wants her dead, and Jeanne must take drastic measures to keep safe.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Murder Among Friends
programme.desc: In the summer of 1980, a popular teen goes for a run around her hometown in Maine. Days later, her savagely beaten body is found. But what happened remains a mystery for years, until her mother intervenes and forces police to re-examine the case.

programme.title: The Body in the Trunk
programme.desc: When Cathy Torrez disappears after her shift at a local drugstore in California, a desperate hunt begins. A week later, police discover her body in the trunk of her own car. Her murder sparks a twenty-year fight to put her killer behind bars.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Brother's Secrets
programme.desc: Sean Lewis isn't surprised to hear his brother, Patrick, has been arrested again. But this time, Sean learns that every time he had helped his brother get out of some jam he was unwittingly helping a monster continue living a secret double life.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: We're Watching You
programme.desc: 40 year-old Rachael Anderson, mother of four, calls an old friend one Friday evening in April 2010 about a home improvement project she'd never complete. Eight years later, she's still missing, and two men are behind bars.

programme.title: Heart of Darkness: Gambling With The Devil
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in her car by her husband and son.

programme.title: Heart of Darkness: Murder in the Poconos
programme.desc: Benjamin Amato and Cheryl Kunkle's May-December becomes complicated when Cheryl becomes pregnant with the couple's child. The former lovers are soon at war in court. But the day before their final custody hearing, a murder changes everything.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: She was the bright, bubbly cheerleader. He was the football star. Teen sweethearts whose on-again, off-again relationship would end when one of them was found murdered.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Devil in Disguise
programme.desc: Shanann Watts and her two daughters went missing. Her husband Chris was on television, pleading for their return. Then their bodies were found at the oil site where he worked.

programme.title: Vanished in New Canaan: An ID Mystery
programme.desc: When clues at Jennifer Dulos's New Canaan, Connecticut home prompt police to search for the missing mother, her estranged husband's behaviour deepens the mystery. A complex web of evidence secures arrests, but what happens next shocks the nation.

programme.title: Disappeared: On a Mission
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman moves to the United States for a new opportunity, but in a mere matter of weeks, she vanishes without a trace. Kidnapping survivor, Elizabeth Smart, joins in the search to find her in this mystery where the clues are sparse.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Terror After Midnight
programme.desc: A young Hollywood celebrity is out celebrating her birthday, and another young woman enjoys a late drink with friends. Just a few hours later, they both end up dead.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Haunting Memories
programme.desc: When a college student goes missing from a mall parking lot, police are convinced foul play is behind her disappearance.

programme.title: McMartin Preschool Trial: The Crimes That Changed Us
programme.desc: When the parents of children in a California preschool are informed that their kids may have been the victims of sexual abuse, it sets off a chain of panic and catastrophic events that will put an innocent man on trial for the heinous crimes.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: House of the Rising Gun
programme.desc: A single mother of four children finds the perfect house in New Orleans -- complete with a nice family next door. All is well until a robbery at the neighbor's home leads first to misunderstanding, then to paranoia, conflict and horrible bloodshed.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Evil Blossoms
programme.desc: When Alisha Bromfield's supervisor, Brian Cooper, promotes her to team leader she should be ecstatic. But Brian's motives are not entirely good. Alisha stands her ground with Brian, letting him know she doesn't want a relationship beyond co-workers.

programme.title: Suspicious Minds: Rumors in the Halls
programme.desc: Suspicion lands close to home when 17-year-old prom queen Aquilla Flood is found dead in her bedroom. Her family faces tough questions, while Aquilla's friends point detectives to three young men.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Broken Trust
programme.desc: A teen girl with big ambitions of becoming a cop falls hard for the charm of an NYPD officer. He promises to make all her dreams come true but when affairs of the heart are complicated by the letter of the law.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.title: Hitler's Death Ray
programme.desc: 5,100 miles from the Earth a solar death ray can be found orbiting the skies. At the thrust of rocket, this solar mirror will obliterate any city. This was the Nazi dream, see the reality.

programme.title: High Hitler and His Nazi Supersoldiers
programme.desc: Newly discovered secret files reveal the huge drugs program that fuelled the Nazi war machine. Led by Hitler, himself possessed by narcotics, the German troops consume tens of millions of Crystal Meth tablets throughout the war, driving them to extremes.

programme.title: American Titans: Daly vs. Clark
programme.desc: The lawless territory of 1880's Montana remains up for grabs. Two relentless American Titans, William Clark and Marcus Daly, find themselves in a war to control power over the state and to mine millions in copper ore hidden in the 'richest hill on earth.'

programme.title: Patriots Rising: The American Revolution: Rise of the Patriots
programme.desc: Five unsung patriots strike pivotal blows for American liberty as unrest between Britain and the colonies explodes into a war for independence.

programme.title: Patriots Rising: The American Revolution: The Empire Fights Back
programme.desc: Time after time, American independence seems like a lost cause as George Washington's Continental Army teeters on the brink of annihilation. The heroics of five little-known patriots help the colonies live to fight another day.

programme.title: Patriots Rising: The American Revolution: Return of the Rebels
programme.desc: The American Revolution seems doomed as the British army launches a bold new campaign in the south, but five unsung patriots help reverse the course of the war and shock the world.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.
